title: pyrus malus var. dasyphylla
intro: Pyrus malus var. dasyphylla, also known as the Asian pear or Chinese pear, is a variety of pear tree native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The fruit, leaves, and roots of the plant have been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, to promote overall health and well-being. The health benefits of Pyrus malus var. dasyphylla include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine.
